title: The Jewel of Seven Stars
author: Bram Stoker
description: The Jewel of Seven Stars Bram Stoker - The Jewel of Seven Stars is a horror novel by Irish writer Bram Stoker, first published by Heinemann in 1903. The story is a first-person narrative of a young man pulled into an archaeologist's plot to revive Queen Tera, an ancient Egyptian mummy.
subjects: British and irish fiction (fictional works by one author)
